title: In some way or other the Lord will provide
firstLine: In some way or other the Lord will provide.
publicDomainBasis: Martha Walker Cook (1806–1874), Philip Phillips (1834–1895). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
Chorus
Chorus
sections.text:
Despond then no longer; the Lord will provide:
And this be the token—no word He hath spoken
Was ever yet broken: “The Lord will provide.”

sections.label: Chorus
